_meta._description: Tower Defense Towers (The 'Plants'). Purchased with the CHF generated by the Investments.
_meta._mechanics: Placed on the grid to stop the market enemies (Threats).

defenses.name: Muro Fiduciario
defenses.description: A solid wall of fiat currency. Blocks enemies so your other defenses can attack them.

defenses.name: Corredor Agresivo
defenses.description: Attacks fast and hard, but has very short range. Needs to be placed close to the action.

defenses.name: Analista Sniper
defenses.description: Shoots targeted research reports from afar. Very high damage, but shoots slowly.

defenses.name: Cuerpo de ETFs
defenses.description: Throws diversified portfolios that explode on impact, hurting multiple market threats at once.

defenses.name: Intervención del Banco Central
defenses.description: The ultimate weapon. Prints money to eradicate everything on the screen, but takes a long time to recharge.
